channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Inman: A sneak peak at 49ers’ Super Bowl LX plot after Eagles dethrone Chiefs
item.description: If the 49ers dethrone the Eagles next season, that will could yield a historic win in Super Bowl LX at Levi's Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Lindsey Vonn says 'I didn’t help myself' with social media posts involving Mikaela Shiffrin
item.description: Lindsey Vonn acknowledges that “I didn’t help myself” by firing back on social media after learning that she wasn’t paired with Mikaela Shiffin for the team combined race at the skiing world championships.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dampf, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Super Bowl LIX shatters viewership records as millions watched Eagles win
item.description: Super Bowl LIX shattered viewership numbers, FOX Sports said on Monday. The Philadelphia Eagles defeated the Kansas City Chiefs, 40-22.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Travis Kelce's ex celebrates Eagles' Super Bowl LIX win over Chiefs
item.description: Kayla Nicole, the former girlfriend of Kansas City Chiefs star Travis Kelce, celebrated the Philadelphia Eagles' Super Bowl LIX win down on the field on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Michigan basketball aims to extend winning streaks in high stakes rematch vs. Boilermakers
item.description: The No. 20 ranked Michigan Wolverines are on a roll, boasting a four-game winning streak and an impressive 11-game home winning streak. They are set to rematch the Purdue Boilermakers in a highly anticipated game for the top spot in the Big Ten Conference.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: The big question going into NBA All-Star weekend: Will the new format work? There is some skepticism
item.description: Red Auerbach once got ejected from an All-Star Game for arguing a call. Rick Barry and Bob Cousy each fouled out of All-Star Games twice, the only players who can say that. Dwyane Wade was whistled for the first flagrant All-Star foul after breaking Kobe Bryant’s nose.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LaMelo Ball misses second half of Hornets' game against Brooklyn with right ankle soreness
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — LaMelo Ball missed the second half of Charlotte's 97-89 loss to the Brooklyn Nets on Monday night because of right ankle soreness.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sidney Crosby says he's good to go for Canada at 4 Nations after missing Penguins games with injury
item.description: BROSSARD, Quebec (AP) — After missing Pittsburgh's final two games before the NHL break for the 4 Nations Face-Off, Sidney Crosby took part in Canada's first practice Monday and declared himself good to go.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Timberwolves sale to Marc Lore and Alex Rodriguez back on track after arbitration ruling
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The ownership transfer of the Minnesota Timberwolves must continue as originally planned, after a three-person arbitration panel ruled 2-1 that controlling owner Glen Taylor must cede control of the NBA club to partners Marc Lore and Alex Rodriguez in the disputed final phase of t
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiger Woods withdraws from Genesis Invitational after death of mom
item.description: Tiger Woods announced on Monday he will no longer participate in the Genesis Invitational as he's still "processing" the death of his mother.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: After Super Bowl flop, the Chiefs look toward the future with massive changes on the horizon
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Even as the confetti was flying and the Philadelphia Eagles were celebrating their Super Bowl triumph on the field of the Superdome, Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs already were thinking about getting back to the big game next year.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Canada beats US 3-1 in Game 5 to win the Rivalry Series women's hockey showcase
item.description: Jennifer Gardiner broke a tie with 6:44 left and Canada beat the United States 3-1 on Saturday night to win the Rivalry Series women's hockey showcase for the third straight time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Curry scores 34 points, Butler adds 25 in Golden State debut as Warriors rally to beat Bulls 132-111
item.description: Stephen Curry scored 34 points and tied a season high with eight 3-pointers, Jimmy Butler added 25 points in his Golden State debut and the Warriors rallied to beat the Chicago Bulls 132-111 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Padres sign outfielder/first baseman Connor Joe for 2025 season
item.description: The San Diego Padres have made a move to bolster their roster for the upcoming season by signing outfielder and first baseman Connor Joe to a one-year contract, President of Baseball Operations and General Manager A.J. Preller announced Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James will sit out the Lakers' game against Indiana to rest his sore left ankle
item.description: LeBron James is sitting out the Los Angeles Lakers ' game against Indiana on Saturday to rest his sore left ankle.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former Bears coach Dick Jauron dies at 74
item.description: Longtime NFL player and coach Dick Jauron, who led the Chicago Bears to the playoffs and was voted AP coach of the year in 2001, died Saturday. He was 74.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: McCallum wins all-around as Red Rocks beat Arizona
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Grace McCallum won the all-around with a score of 39.65 to lead the 4th-ranked Utah gymnastics team past #19 Arizona, 197.675 to 196.125.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL has no plans to end DEI practices, commissioner says
item.description: The NFL is committed to sticking to its DEI policies despite a change in its Super Bowl on-field messaging campaign
item.dc:creator: Libbey Dean, NewsNation

item.title: Public visitation scheduled for Virginia Halas McCaskey
item.description: The public will have an opportunity to pay their respects and say goodbye to Virginia Halas McCaskey, the longtime owner and matriarch of the Chicago Bears, who passed away Thursday at the age of 102.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: Big Game Bound: Breaking down the matchups headed into Super Bowl weekend
item.description: The Chiefs and Eagles will kickoff Super Bowl LIX in two days from the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans, both with hopes of being crowned the kings of the NFL.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, NewsNation

item.title: BREAKING: Junior Hockey League expansion team coming to Grand Junction 2025
item.description: Starting this fall, the action and excitement of the National Collegiate Development Conference, the highest level of the United States Premiere Hockey League, a Tier II junior hockey league, will be in Grand Junction at River City Sportplex.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Daytona boss inspires students with his NASCAR journey
item.description: The "Super Bowl" of racing, the Daytona 500, will be the next biggest event in the world of sports, taking place February 16, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Davis Suppes, NewsNation

item.title: McDavid makes perfect pass in overtime as the Oilers beat the Blackhawks 4-3
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor McDavid set up Zach Hyman in overtime, and the Edmonton Oilers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 4-3 on Wednesday night. Hyman redirected McDavid's pass for the power-play goal at 1:36. It was Hyman's 19th goal and McDavid's 49th assist of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz come back to beat Warriors, 131-128
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Jordan Clarkson scored 31 points and Keyonte George added 26 to lead the Utah Jazz to a 131-128 victory over the Golden State Warriors on Wednesday night. Isaiah Collier added 20 points and 11 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Several student-athletes lock in colleges on first NSD of 2025
item.description: Sean Lewis made it clear he wanted to put a fence around San Diego in the recruiting world. He proved it in the high school realm by bringing in 2024 Iron Hog winner Jett Thomas of La Jolla.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Bevan Brothers Commit to Colorado Mesa
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Two brothers from Plateau Valley High School are taking the next step in their athletic careers, and they won’t have to go far to do it. Jackson and Heston Bevan, both standout multi-sport athletes, are staying close to home.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Warriors to trade for Miami's Jimmy Butler: ESPN
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors are finalizing a blockbuster trade for Miami Heat star Jimmy Butler, ESPN reported Wednesday. Butler, 35, also agreed to an extension with the Warriors that will keep him with the team through the 2026-27 season, ESPN said.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Big 12 Conference unveils 2025 schedule, Utah and BYU to meet in October
item.description: It's a big day for college football fans as the Big 12 Conference released the full 2025 season schedule which includes the schedules for the Utah Utes and the BYU Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4
